requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and Tropical-Humidity Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据及热带湿度降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據及熱帶濕度降額

summary.en: Equatorial Guinea has no confirmed strong public national standards body route for solar PV inverter safety certification comparable to markets with a formal inverter product approval list. Safety acceptance should therefore be prepared around internationally recognised IEC evidence and project-owner requirements. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the primary safety references for PV power converters and inverters. Project files should include accredited IEC 62109 type-test certificates or reports for the exact model or model family, nameplate and installation manual consistency, Spanish-language safety instructions, protection-device coordination, earthing and isolation details, DC arc and surge-protection assumptions, and environmental limits. Tropical humidity is a material design issue in Equatorial Guinea: derating, enclosure ingress protection, condensation control, corrosion-resistant terminals, PCB coating, ventilation spacing, and operating temperature/humidity limits should be documented.
summary.zh: 赤道几内亚尚未确认存在类似具有正式逆变器产品批准清单市场的、强有力公开国家标准机构太阳能光伏逆变器安全认证路径。因此，安全接受应围绕国际认可的IEC证据和项目业主要求准备。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏功率变换器和逆变器的主要安全参考。项目文件应包括针对准确型号或型号系列的认可IEC 62109型式试验证书或报告、铭牌和安装手册一致性、西班牙语安全说明、保护装置配合、接地和隔离细节、直流拉弧和浪涌保护假设以及环境限值。热带湿度是赤道几内亚的实质设计问题：应记录降额、外壳防护等级、冷凝控制、耐腐蚀端子、PCB涂覆、通风间距以及运行温湿度限值。
summary.zht: 赤道幾內亞尚未確認存在類似具有正式逆變器產品批准清單市場的、強有力公開國家標準機構太陽能光伏逆變器安全認證路徑。因此，安全接受應圍繞國際認可的IEC證據和項目業主要求準備。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏功率轉換器和逆變器的主要安全參考。項目文件應包括針對準確型號或型號系列的認可IEC 62109型式試驗證書或報告、銘牌和安裝手冊一致性、西班牙語安全說明、保護裝置配合、接地和隔離細節、直流拉弧和浪湧保護假設以及環境限值。熱帶濕度是赤道幾內亞的實質設計問題：應記錄降額、外殼防護等級、冷凝控制、耐腐蝕端子、PCB塗覆、通風間距以及運行溫濕度限值。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Project-owner, EPC, lender, and SEGESA-facing safety submittal requirements for Equatorial Guinea PV projects
Tropical humidity, corrosion, condensation, ventilation, and derating evidence for outdoor or semi-outdoor inverter installations

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, CNAS-accredited laboratory reports, Chinese manuals, and China-rated labels. These documents can help establish manufacturing baseline and supplier qualification. They are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Equatorial Guinea projects, and they may be based on China voltage assumptions, China-language warnings, China installation practice, and domestic environmental categories.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证、CNAS认可实验室报告、中文手册和中国额定标签。这些文件可帮助证明制造基准和供应商资质。它们不会自动作为赤道几内亚项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证据，并且可能基于中国电压假设、中文警示、中国安装实践和国内环境类别。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證、CNAS認可實驗室報告、中文手冊和中國額定標籤。這些文件可幫助證明製造基準和供應商資質。它們不會自動作為赤道幾內亞項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證據，並且可能基於中國電壓假設、中文警示、中國安裝實踐和國內環境類別。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary PV inverter certification and CNAS-accredited China laboratory reports

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T safety files should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence and a project safety dossier for Equatorial Guinea. The dossier should map test certificates to the supplied model, verify labels and manuals in Spanish, state 230/400 V at 50 Hz installation assumptions, document protective earthing and isolation, and address tropical humidity derating. Where the supplied inverter differs from the IEC-tested configuration by firmware, enclosure, SPD, terminal, fan, coating, filter, or voltage setting, obtain written acceptance from the EPC, lender, SEGESA-facing engineer, or owner engineer before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T安全文件应补充IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据以及面向赤道几内亚项目的安全案卷。该案卷应将测试证书映射至供应型号，核验西班牙语标签和手册，说明230/400 V、50 Hz安装假设，记录保护接地和隔离，并处理热带湿度降额。若供应逆变器在固件、外壳、浪涌保护器、端子、风扇、涂覆、滤波器或电压设置方面不同于IEC测试配置，应在出货前取得EPC、贷款方、面向SEGESA的工程师或业主工程师的书面接受。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T安全文件應補充IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據以及面向赤道幾內亞項目的安全案卷。該案卷應將測試證書映射至供應型號，核驗西班牙語標籤和手冊，說明230/400 V、50 Hz安裝假設，記錄保護接地和隔離，並處理熱帶濕度降額。若供應逆變器在韌體、外殼、浪湧保護器、端子、風扇、塗覆、濾波器或電壓設置方面不同於IEC測試配置，應在出貨前取得EPC、貸款方、面向SEGESA的工程師或業主工程師的書面接受。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but mandatory in practice where EPC, lender, SEGESA-facing engineer, owner engineer, or customs file review requires internationally recognised inverter safety evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 support China domestic qualification but do not create automatic IEC 62109 acceptance in Equatorial Guinea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 inverter safety file should not be treated as automatic IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Equatorial Guinea. Prepare accredited IEC 62109-1/-2 reports, Spanish safety documentation, 230/400 V at 50 Hz installation assumptions, and tropical-humidity derating evidence for project review. Confirm acceptance with the SEGESA-facing EPC, lender, or owner engineer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004逆变器安全文件视为赤道几内亚自动接受的IEC 62109-1/-2证据。应为项目审查准备认可的IEC 62109-1/-2报告、西班牙语安全文件、230/400 V、50 Hz安装假设以及热带湿度降额证据。出货前请与面向SEGESA的EPC、贷款方或业主工程师确认接受情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004逆變器安全文件視為赤道幾內亞自動接受的IEC 62109-1/-2證據。應為項目審查準備認可的IEC 62109-1/-2報告、西班牙語安全文件、230/400 V、50 Hz安裝假設以及熱帶濕度降額證據。出貨前請與面向SEGESA的EPC、貸款方或業主工程師確認接受情況。
